Headline: #35 31st/35th Temporary Westbound Reroute near 35th/LaSalle
ShortDescription: Westbound 35 31st/35th  buses are temporarily rerouted via 35th, LaSalle, 33rd, Wentworth and 35th over normal route, due to street blockage near 35th/LaSalle.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #35 31st/35th  buses are temporarily rerouted via 35th, LaSalle, 33rd, Wentworth and 35th over normal route, due to street blockage near 35th/LaSalle.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #81 Lawrence Temporary Westbound Reroute near Lawrence/Lipps
ShortDescription: Westbound #81 Lawrence buses are rerouted via Lawrence, Milwaukee, Jefferson Park, then resume their normal route due to street blockage near Lawrence/Lipps.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Westbound #81 Lawrence buses are temporarily rerouted via Lawrence, Milwaukee, Jefferson Park, then resume their normal route.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Why is service being changed?
